drd_rule_full:
Use APACSH logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.

[ETL Notes block]:
Check for regexp_like(cv.cl_val_code,'^APACSH[0-7][0-9]')
For a Transaction, 
If only one record exists then consider that record.
If 2 records exists ( 
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then consider skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          (1) calculate aggregated value from APA.TXN_AMT fields from 'APACSH04' and 'APACSH11' and store it in Cash Transaction Amount and Cash System base currency amount
          (2) populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else Drop those 2 records exception entire transaction
)

APASEC :
Check for cl_val_Code like '^APASEC[0-7][0-9]' THEN consider as 'Security' record.

iAPASEC/iAPACSH:
Refer to below section for further filter criteria on iAPASEC/iAPACSH. Applicable to both iAPACSH and iAPASEC.
odi_full_chain: *STEP3[column_ref]: APA_CASH.ALT_DSC_TRAILER_2 ->  STEP4[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP3_STG_RT.CASH_ALT_DSC_TRAILER_2 ->  STEP5[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP4_STG_RT.CASH_ALT_DSC_TRAILER_2 ->  MERGE_USING[passthrough]: AVY_FACT_STEP5_STG_RT.CASH_ALT_DSC_TRAILER_2 ->  MERGE[column_ref]: S.CASH_ALT_DSC_TRAILER_2
human_explanation: APA_CASH aggregation: ODI filters the APA table to APACSH-prefixed records in STEP1 with the predicate `REGEXP_LIKE(APA_CASH.APA_TP_CD, '^APACSH[0-7][0-9]')` and projects them through the APA_CASH alias.  Plus the documented APACSH04/APACSH11 dual-record resolution when both codes exist for the same transaction.  The DRD's 'Use APACSH logic from ETL Notes' maps exactly to this STEP1 aggregation.
recommendation: SEMANTIC_MATCH -- ODI implements the APACSH selection via STEP1 alias-binding + filter

drd_rule_full:
Use APASEC logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.

[ETL Notes block]:
(Security source CUSIP, Security Product Id, Security CIRD Product Id, Security Option Symbol, Symbol, ISIN, Product Composite Description, Product Short Name, Product Description)

If there is an iAPASEC but no APASEC, consider above fields from iAPASEC

Source Effective Date:
If there is only iAPASEC or only iAPACSH, grab source effective date from the iAPASEC/iAPACSH
If there is atleast 1 APASEC or APACSH, grab source effective date from that APASEC/APACSH

drd_rule_full:
Use APASEC logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.
Applicable only for APASEC93

[ETL Notes block]:
(Security source CUSIP, Security Product Id, Security CIRD Product Id, Security Option Symbol, Symbol, ISIN, Product Composite Description, Product Short Name, Product Description)
If there is atleast 1 APASEC, consider above fields from that APASEC
If there is an iAPASEC but no APASEC, consider above fields from iAPASEC

Source Effective Date:
If there is only iAPASEC or only iAPACSH, grab source effective date from the iAPASEC/iAPACSH
If there is atleast 1 APASEC or APACSH, grab source effective date from that APASEC/APACSH
